title: shiyu-coder/Kronos: a foundation model for financial market data
friendlyTitle: Kronos is an open AI model for studying financial markets
summary: Kronos is an open foundation-model project built for the language of financial markets, with code and resources for modelling market sequences. It is trending with roughly 33,000 GitHub stars at publication time.
friendlySummary: Kronos is a popular open project that applies a foundation model to financial market data.
whyItMatters: Quantitative researchers can study the model, reproduce experiments and test market-specific representations as a research baseline. It is not a trading guarantee; validate on held-out data, include costs and avoid treating generated forecasts as financial advice.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Researchers can learn from the code and test it on market data, but should not trust its forecasts without careful independent checks.
